proof_scope: UX Lab Tau chat integration viewer renders the fresh live Memory route fail-closed proof manifest without broadening its claims.

notable_boundaries: ANSWER_SELECTOR_ATTEMPT routed to memory.clarify, not memory.answer.
ANSWER_DIRECT_PRODUCT proves direct memory.answer.v1 product validation only.

ux_lab_change.commit_message: Render Tau Memory route proof in chat

commands.command: curl -sS http://127.0.0.1:4301/api/tau/memory/routes/failclosed-proof | jq '{ok, schema:.receipt.schema, live:.receipt.live, mocked:.receipt.mocked, routeCount:.receipt.routeCount, routes:.receipt.routes | map({route, branchStatus, failClosed, selectedSkill, memoryProductSchema})}'
commands.result: ok=true; schema=tau.memory_route_failclosed_view.v1; live=true; mocked=false; routeCount=5; RESEARCH_BRAVE_DISABLED branchStatus=FAILED and failClosed=true
CDP hook wrote fresh screenshot/read artifacts under /tmp/codex-ui-verification/pi-mono/tau-memory-route-proof/

visible_evidence: Selector-selected ANSWER route for the natural-language answer probes.

proves: UX Lab can load and normalize the fresh Tau Memory route fail-closed proof through a server endpoint.
The Tau chat integration viewer visibly renders route_count=5, live=true, mocked=false, and the RESEARCH fail-closed branch.
The rendered panel preserves the backend proof's non-claim that selector-selected ANSWER was not proven by the natural-language probes.
does_not_prove: Live Brave search execution for this run.
Selector-selected ANSWER route for natural-language answer probes.
A new live COMPLIANCE browser turn after this UI panel change.
